title: ecbolium depauperatum
intro: Ecbolium depauperatum, also known as the lesser ecbolium, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like ursolic acid, oleic acid, and rosmarinic acid. These compounds are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Ecbolium depauperatum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
